creator: andrew_terekhov@yahoo.com
text:
Failure to build graphics/darktable 2.0.2 if I disable some options:


-- Installing: /construction/xports/graphics/darktable/work/stage/usr/local/./man/man1/darktable-cmstest.1
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===>   Installing ldconfig configuration file
===========================================================================

========================< phase : package         >========================
===>  Building package for darktable-2.0.2_1
pkg-static: Unable to access file /construction/xports/graphics/darktable/work/stage/usr/local/lib/darktable/plugins/lighttable/libprint_settings.so: No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /construction/xports/graphics/darktable/work/stage/usr/local/lib/darktable/views/libprint.so: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /xports/graphics/darktable
===========================================================================

Finished: Friday, 11 MAR 2016 at 21:57:40 UTC
Duration: 00:03:55


Config:

root@bclinton:darktable# make showconfig
===> The following configuration options are available for darktable-2.0.2_1:
     COLORD=on: Color management via colord
     DOCS=off: Build and/or install documentation
     FLICKR=off: Flickr support via flickcurl
     GEO=off: Support geotagging
     GNOMEKEYRING=off: GNOME Keyring password manager support
     GPHOTO=on: Digital cameras support via libgphoto2
     GRAPHMAGICK=off: GraphicsMagick image processing support
     LIBSECRET=off: Support libsecret as password backend
     LUA=off: Lua scripting language support
     NLS=off: Native Language Support
     OPENEXR=on: HDR image format support via OpenEXR
     OPENJPEG=on: Enhanced JPEG graphics support
     PRINT=off: Printer support
     RAWSPEED=on: Compile with rawspeed backend
     SLIDESHOW=off: Build OpenGL/SDL slideshow viewer
     SQUISH=on: Compress thumbnail via libsquish
     WEBP=on: WebP image format support
